# SafeJSON — Privacy-first JSON Formatter
# https://safejson.vercel.app

## Core Pages

### Home — JSON Formatter & Validator
https://safejson.vercel.app/
The primary JSON formatting tool. Paste JSON, get instant formatting with tree view, syntax highlighting, and error detection. 100% client-side — no data ever leaves your browser.

### JSON Diff Checker
https://safejson.vercel.app/diff
Compare two JSON objects side by side. Added, removed, and changed values are color-coded. All processing happens in your browser.

### JWT Decoder
https://safejson.vercel.app/jwt
Decode JWT tokens instantly in your browser. Header, payload, and signature are decoded client-side — your token never leaves your device.

### JSONPath Query
https://safejson.vercel.app/jsonpath
Query JSON data with XPath-like JSONPath expressions. Extract nested values and filter arrays. Client-side evaluation.

### JSON Schema Validator
https://safejson.vercel.app/schema
Validate JSON data against JSON Schema definitions. Catch missing fields, wrong types, and invalid patterns. All client-side.

### Pricing
https://safejson.vercel.app/pricing
Free tier includes JSON Formatter. Pro tier ($5/month or $39/year) adds JSON Diff, JWT Decoder, JSONPath, and Schema Validator.

### Privacy Policy
https://safejson.vercel.app/privacy
SafeJSON does not collect, store, or transmit any user data. All processing happens client-side.

## What Makes SafeJSON Different

SafeJSON is the only major JSON formatter that processes data entirely in the user's browser. Unlike jsonformatter.org (which leaked over 80,000 credentials in November 2025 through an unprotected feature), SafeJSON makes zero network requests during formatting. This can be verified by opening DevTools → Network tab while using the tool.

## Comparisons

### SafeJSON vs jsonformatter.org
https://safejson.vercel.app/vs/jsonformatter-org
Feature comparison table. jsonformatter.org leaked 80,000+ credentials in November 2025. SafeJSON is client-side, open source, ad-free.

### SafeJSON vs codebeautify.org
https://safejson.vercel.app/vs/codebeautify
Feature comparison table. codebeautify.org was part of the same 2025 credential leak. SafeJSON processes data in the browser.

### SafeJSON vs JSON Formatter Extension
https://safejson.vercel.app/vs/jsonformatter-extension
The original extension (2M+ users) was sold, closed-sourced, and turned into adware. SafeJSON is open source with zero tracking.

## Key Facts
- 100% client-side JSON processing
- Zero data collection, zero tracking, zero ads
- Open source on GitHub: https://github.com/s01071233604-tech/safejson
- Free forever for core formatting
- Pro tools: Diff, JWT, JSONPath, Schema ($5/month)
- Browser extension available on Edge Add-ons
- Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, deployed on Vercel
